subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Remember thy Lord through this Most Great Remembrance. Praise be unto Thee, O my God, my Lord and the Beloved of my heart, inasmuch as [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی اذکری ربک بهذا الذکر الاعظم لک الحمد یا الهی و سیدی و محبوب قلبی بما
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @praise and encouragement, @prayer for nearness to God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @love of God, @suffering and imprisonment
